mosques.name: York University Muslim Prayer Space
mosques.address: 4700 Keele St, North York, ON M3J 1P3
mosques.notes: Located in Scott Religious Centre, York University campus.
mosques.description: Muslim prayer space located in the Scott Religious Centre at York University, managed by the York University Muslim Students' Association with dedicated rooms for daily prayers and Jumu'ah.
mosques.accessInfo: Scott Religious Centre, 2nd floor. Additional prayer spaces in Student Centre Room 321 and Second Student Centre 4th floor.

mosques.name: Ryerson (TMU) Muslim Students' Prayer Room
mosques.notes: Toronto Metropolitan University campus prayer room.
mosques.description: Campus prayer room at Toronto Metropolitan University (formerly Ryerson) serving Muslim students with daily prayer facilities.
mosques.accessInfo: Located inside TMU campus. Check with TMU Muslim Students' Association for room location and access.

mosques.name: Scarborough Civic Centre Prayer Room
mosques.notes: Prayer room available in the Scarborough Civic Centre.
mosques.description: Prayer room available within the Scarborough Civic Centre for Muslim community members and visitors.
mosques.accessInfo: Located inside Scarborough Civic Centre. Check with building administration for room location.

mosques.name: Ismaili Jamatkhana Scarborough
mosques.description: Ismaili Jamatkhana serving the Ismaili Muslim community in Scarborough with worship services and community programs in a modern, serene facility.

mosques.name: STC Musalla (Scarborough Town Centre)
mosques.notes: Informal prayer space used by Muslim shoppers and workers near Scarborough Town Centre.
mosques.description: Informal prayer space used by Muslim shoppers and workers near Scarborough Town Centre mall.
mosques.accessInfo: Informal musalla near the Scarborough Town Centre shopping area.

mosques.name: Bab ul Ilm - Bani Hashim Society
mosques.description: Shia Islamic centre established in 1982, serving the community with congregation, commemoration, and celebration of religious festivals, including free medical and dental services.

mosques.name: Dawoodi Bohra Al Masjid Al Saifee
mosques.description: Dawoodi Bohra mosque and community centre, one of the oldest Dawoodi Bohra masjids in the Western world, featuring elegant architecture and serving the Bohra community in the GTA.

mosques.name: Sayyidah Zainab Centre
mosques.description: Sunni mosque following the Ahle Sunnat Wal Jama'at (Barelvi) tradition, established in 2018, serving as a centre of Muslim unity and interfaith relationships in the GTA.

mosques.name: Baitul Jannah Islamic Center
mosques.address: 35 Hallcrown Pl, North York, ON M2J 1A7
mosques.description: Masjid in the heart of Scarborough serving a large and diverse Muslim community with religious, social, educational, and recreational services.

mosques.name: Masjid Noor-ul-Haram
mosques.description: Sunni mosque in Oakville established by World Islamic Mission Canada in 1989, serving the Muslim communities of Oakville, Mississauga, and Milton on an 11-acre property.

mosques.name: Newmarket Islamic Centre
mosques.description: One of the oldest Islamic centres in York Region, established in 2005, representing over 62 nationalities and providing comprehensive Islamic education for youth.

mosques.name: Winston Churchill Mosque
mosques.description: Newly built mosque also known as Meadowvale Islamic Centre, located on Winston Churchill Blvd in Mississauga, serving the local Muslim community with multiple Jumu'ah services.

mosques.name: Pickering Islamic Centre
mosques.description: Sunni mosque also known as Masjid Usman, serving the Pickering community for over 25 years with Islamic education for children and adults in accordance with the Quran and Sunnah.

mosques.name: Mount Pleasant Islamic Center
mosques.description: Sunni mosque also known as Masjid Al Salam, a converted church in Mount Pleasant Village, Brampton, offering full-time Quran memorization programs and community services.

mosques.name: Mubarak Mosque
mosques.description: Ahmadiyya Muslim mosque built in 2018, featuring a 96-foot minaret with blue dome, serving as a welcoming space for all faiths to pray, visit, and learn about Islam.

mosques.name: Jam'e Masjid Markham
mosques.description: First masjid built in the Town of Markham by the Islamic Society of Markham, serving as a focal point for the Muslim community with spacious prayer areas and educational programs.

mosques.name: Masjid Darul Iman
mosques.description: Second mosque project of the Islamic Society of Markham, a 25,000 sq ft facility at Swan Lake with a gymnasium, Islamic school, and full-time Hifz program.

mosques.name: Imam Bukhari Centre
mosques.address: 50 Steeles Ave E, Milton, ON L9T 8P1
mosques.description: Salafi mosque and dawah centre operated by the Ahle-Hadith Society of Canada, known for its clean, cozy environment and community Quran and Tajweed classes.

mosques.name: Islamic Community Centre of Milton
mosques.description: Sunni mosque operated by ICNA (Islamic Circle of North America) serving Milton's Muslim community with various programs and community activities.

mosques.name: Muslim Association of Milton
mosques.description: Non-profit organization serving Milton's Muslim community for over a decade, operating the Halton Islamic Community Centre Masjid and Halton Learning Centre Musala.

mosques.name: Spiritual Society Canada
mosques.description: Sunni Islamic centre in Scarborough providing daily prayers, educational programs for children and adults, and community outreach initiatives.
mosques.accessInfo: Extra parking available at Epiphany Lutheran Church, 20 Old Kingston Rd.

mosques.name: The Reign of Islamic Da'Wah (TROID)
mosques.description: Non-profit dawah organization established in 1998, operating Masjidul-Furqaan and an Islamic centre focused on Salafi teachings with publications, conferences, and lectures.

mosques.name: Masjid Quba (Ajax)
mosques.address: 55 Harwood Ave S, Ajax, ON L1S 2H8
mosques.description: First masjid in Ajax, established by the Islamic Society of Ajax in 2013, completed construction in 2016, serving a Muslim population of approximately 10,000 with education and community programs.

mosques.name: Imdadul Islamic Jamat
mosques.address: 26 Le Page Ct, Toronto, ON M3J 1Z9
mosques.description: Sunni mosque established in 1995 in the heart of North York, serving a large and diverse Muslim community as a spiritual, educational, and social sanctuary.

mosques.name: Masjid Omar Bin Khatab
mosques.address: 2345 Dundas St W, Toronto, ON M6R 1X2
mosques.description: Downtown Toronto mosque established in 1992, serving one of the largest youth populations in the area with daily programs, counselling, and community services.

mosques.name: Khalid Bin Al-Waleed Mosque
mosques.address: 2 Thorncliffe Park Dr Unit 32, Toronto, ON M4H 1G4
mosques.description: Federally incorporated charitable organization established in the 1990s in Etobicoke, with a focus on serving Somali-speaking newcomers and providing comprehensive settlement support.

mosques.name: Islamic Information Centre
mosques.notes: Islamic information and prayer space downtown.
mosques.description: Islamic information and prayer space in downtown Toronto providing information about Islam and prayer facilities.

mosques.name: Masjid Sunnah Al-Nabawiah
mosques.address: 2435 Finch Ave W, North York, ON M9M 2E7
mosques.description: Sunni mosque in Toronto, also associated with Ummah Nabawiah Masjid, serving the local Muslim community since 1994 with daily prayers and community programs.

mosques.name: Ja'ffari Islamic Centre
mosques.description: Largest Shia Islamic centre facility in North America at 165,000 sq ft, administered by the Islamic Shia Ithna-Asheri Jamaat of Toronto, serving over 7,000 members with extensive programs.

mosques.name: Al-Mahdi Islamic Centre
mosques.description: Shia Islamic community centre established in 1984, serving over 1,500 individuals from diverse cultural backgrounds with religious, spiritual, cultural, and social services.

mosques.name: Masjid As-Siddique
mosques.description: Sunni mosque in Mississauga offering daily prayers, Jumu'ah services, Arabic language courses, and community programs with doors locked at time of Iqaamah for safety.
mosques.accessInfo: Masjid door is locked at the time of Iqaamah for safety and security.

mosques.name: Brampton Islamic Center
mosques.description: Sunni Islamic centre in Brampton, formerly a church purchased by the Muslim community in 2005, embracing the multiculturalism of the city.

mosques.name: Jamiat-Ul-Ansar of Brampton
mosques.address: 291 Great Lakes Dr, Brampton, ON L6R 2S1
mosques.description: Federally registered Sunni charity since 1984, also known as Great Lakes Masjid, providing worship, prayer, reflection, and learning space for Brampton's Muslim community.

mosques.name: Jame Makki Masjid Brampton
mosques.description: Mosque established in the early 1980s by the Islamic Society of Peel, featuring a 2000 sq metre facility with a full-time Islamic school (K-8) and comprehensive community services.

mosques.name: Masjid Al Qalam
mosques.description: Sunni mosque on Dufferin Street in York, Toronto, offering daily prayers, Arabic and Quran classes for youth and adults, and funeral services.

mosques.name: Muslim Neighbour Nexus
mosques.address: 3553 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8W 1P4
mosques.description: Registered non-profit in Mississauga serving approximately 10,000 Muslims in the Churchill Meadows and Lisgar communities with a dome-structure masjid opened in 2019.

mosques.name: Oshawa Mosque (Masjid Hamza)
mosques.address: 67 Bond St W, Oshawa, ON L1G 1A3
mosques.description: First purpose-built masjid in Oshawa, opened in 2012, serving the local Muslim community with daily prayers, Jumu'ah, educational lectures, and licensed Nikah services.

mosques.name: Masjidur Rahmah
mosques.description: Sunni mosque in downtown Toronto's Regent Park neighbourhood operated by the Central Toronto Islamic Foundation, hosting a madrassah with full-time Hifz and community programs.
